name: Cantaloupe Cooler
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cantaloupe in half and remove the seeds.
2. Peel and slice into wedges.
3. Chop the wedges into pieces that will fit a food processor or blender.
4. Add all of the ingredients, including the cantaloupe, to the blender.
5. Puree until very smooth.
6. Refrigerate for several hours to allow the flavors to blend.
7. Before serving, stir the mixture gently.
8. Serve cold with a garnish of fresh mint or lime slices.
(Each 1/2 cup serving contains: Total Calories, Sat Fat, Protein, Carbohydrates, Dietary Fiber, Fat, Saturated Fat, Cholesterol, and Sodium.)
